creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 217180
Patch for netdata

Switch to upstream release archive
Disable anonymous statistics [1]

Tested on FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r361421 (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 12.1-RELEASE (amd64)

[1] https://github.com/netdata/netdata/blob/master/docs/anonymous-statistics.md#opt-out
